Our Flagship Service

Advanced Hair Transplant with Patented Techniques

Assure Clinic pioneers three breakthrough techniques — UHDHT, UFME, and DSHI — delivering ultra-high-density, natural-looking results with 95% graft survival.

UHDHT Hair Transplant

Our signature Ultra High Density Hair Transplant combining patented UFME extraction and DSHI implantation. 95% graft survival.

Learn More →

FUE Hair Transplant

Gold standard follicular unit extraction technique for natural, permanent results with minimal scarring.

Learn More →

DHI Hair Transplant

Direct Hair Implantation with Choi pen technology. Assure's DSHI upgrade achieves 80+ grafts per sq cm density.

Learn More →

The Assure Difference

How Assure Clinic Compares to Other Hair Transplant Clinics

See why 20,000+ patients chose Assure Clinic over other hair transplant options.

Feature Recommended Assure Clinic Generic Clinics
Procedures Performed By Qualified Doctors Only Technicians or Assistants
Extraction Technique Patented UFME (Ultra Fine Micro Extraction) Standard FUE
Implantation Method Patented DSHI (Direct Simultaneous Hair Implant) Conventional Slit Method
Graft Survival Rate 95% Graft Survival 70–80% Industry Average
Clinic Network 13 Clinics (India & Dubai) Single Clinic or Limited Branches
Aftercare Support Lifetime Aftercare & Follow-ups Limited or Time-Bound Follow-up
Quality Certification ISO Certified Clinics No Standard Certification
Track Record 20,000+ Successful Procedures Limited or Undisclosed Volume

Frequently Asked Questions

Common Questions About Hair Transplant

No. The procedure is performed under local anaesthesia, so you feel no pain during extraction or implantation. Most patients describe the experience as comfortable and relaxed. You can take breaks, eat, and use your phone during the session. Mild tenderness in the donor area may last 2-3 days after the procedure, managed easily with prescribed medication.

Yes. Transplanted hair follicles are taken from the donor area (back and sides of the head) which is genetically resistant to hair loss. These follicles retain their characteristics after transplantation and continue to grow naturally for a lifetime. Initial results are visible within 3-4 months, with full density at 10-12 months.

Most patients return to work within 2-3 days. Initial redness subsides within 7-10 days. Transplanted hair sheds temporarily at 2-3 weeks (completely normal), with new growth starting at 3-4 months. Full results are visible at 10-12 months. Our team provides comprehensive aftercare support throughout your recovery.

Assure Clinic uses a patented UHDHT (Ultra High Density Hair Transplant) method that combines two proprietary techniques: UFME for ultra-fine extraction with minimal scarring, and DSHI for precision implantation that maximises graft survival. All procedures are performed exclusively by qualified doctors, never technicians. With 13 clinics across 11 cities, 60+ doctors, and a 95% graft survival rate across 20,000+ procedures, Assure delivers consistently natural results at scale.

Cost depends on the number of grafts needed, the technique used, clinic location, and case complexity. Assure Clinic uses transparent Full Head Results pricing based on achieving your desired outcome, not per-graft costs. Every case is unique, so we recommend a free consultation for a personalised estimate. Call +91-9586122444 or fill out the form above to get started.

You can book a free consultation by filling out the form on this page, calling +91-9586122444, or sending a WhatsApp message. A medical consultant will assess your hair loss pattern, discuss your goals, and recommend the best treatment approach. Consultations are completely free with no obligations.
